site.title: Benjamin Nößler — Fullstack developer based in Vienna
site.description: Benjamin Nößler — fullstack developer based in Vienna. Web apps, APIs, and landing pages in TypeScript. Wien Digital, freelance, and my side projects.

hero.headline: Fast, well-built landing pages and web apps for Vienna-based businesses.
hero.body: Freelance fullstack developer with ten years of TypeScript experience. Embedded with the Wien Digital team by day, taking selected landing-page redesigns and small fullstack builds on the side.

services.label: Services
services.intro: Two kinds of projects I take on most often.

landing.title: Landing page redesign
landing.description: Analyse and rebuild an existing marketing or landing page — clear structure, fast load times, proper bilingual DE/EN, GDPR-compliant.

fullstack.title: Fullstack development
fullstack.description: For projects beyond a single page — web apps, APIs, dashboards, internal tools. Cleanly built, transparently deployed.

steps.title: Talk
steps.body: 15 minutes, free. I listen, ask questions, tell you honestly whether I'm a fit.

steps.title: Fixed-price quote
steps.body: Clear scope, clear price. No hidden hours.

steps.title: Build in 2–4 weeks
steps.body: Transparent status, a single point of contact, clean launch.

about.label: About
bodyParagraphs: I help local businesses modernise their web presence — usually a landing-page redesign, sometimes a full web app. Vienna is home base; most of the work happens remote.

I work for APC Business Services GmbH and am embedded through them with the Wien Digital team, working on technical questions around data projects. On the side I take on selected freelance work — mostly landing-page redesigns and smaller fullstack builds for local businesses.

I prefer projects meant to last longer than a quarter: cleanly built, on my own infrastructure (Hetzner/Coolify), with tools I'll still trust in two years. Business context matters to me as much as the code — so I enjoy talking to people who know their problem better than I do.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Tell me about your project.
contact.body: Send me a few sentences about your project. I usually reply within 48 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: What's this about? A few sentences about the project, the current page, or your audience is perfect.
form.errorBody: Please try again or email me directly at benjamin@noessler.at.
